updates.title: Can your tax refund be denied if you missed filing ITR last year? Here are your options

updates.title: I-T dept flags up to 20,000 ITRs for ‘swapped provisions’ used to lower net tax liability — What happens next?
updates.summary: The income tax department has identified 15,000-20,000 cases of taxpayers using swapped provisions to reduce taxable income. This involves replacing exemptions to lower tax liability without valid reasons and documents. Details here.
